main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'propilenglicol residual... non-wetting parcial' matches PG + no-wetting

key_signals.justification: C2: 6 signals (caudal 36%, dP low, P=64 bar, cond 480, mejora 36->78, aclarado 30min)

alternatives.justification: C3: 2 alts (congelacion, biofouling) but third truncated; reasonable

recommended_action.justification: C4: long flush 4-6h ok but suggests CIP alcalino NaOH 0.1% at 12h (recoverable fail)

requested_data.justification: C5: 1 anchor (TOC permeado), no fabricante consult, no preservation audit

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit numeric: TOC<2 mg/L + no improvement at 24h -> autopsia

automatic_fails_triggered.reference: Aplicar CIP ácido o alcalino antes de completar el wetting
automatic_fails_triggered.justification: Propone CIP NaOH si tras 12h flush no >90% caudal - viola fail recoverable

reviewer_notes: Claude conflict; explicit CIP alcalino antes de completar wetting
